# Authentic Wellness

> Physician-prescribed peptide therapy and GLP-1 programs delivered via telehealth in the United States, overseen by a licensed California physician and compounded at FDA-registered pharmacies.

## About

Authentic Wellness is operated by Evolving Wellness LLC DBA Authentic Wellness. All treatments require a Good Faith Exam (GFE) with a licensed clinician via Qualiphy and physician approval from Medical Director Joshua Yang, MD before any prescription is issued. Peptides are compounded by FDA-registered 503B outsourcing facilities. GLP-1 medications (semaglutide, tirzepatide) are compounded by 503A pharmacies as patient-specific prescriptions.

## Programs

- [Weight Loss (GLP-1)](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/weight-loss.html): Semaglutide and Tirzepatide programs
- [Muscle & Performance](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/muscle-performance.html): CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin
- [Recovery & Healing](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/recovery-healing.html): BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu (clinical consultation required for some)
- [Longevity](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/longevity.html): NAD+, Epithalon, Glutathione
- [Sexual Health](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/sexual-health.html): PT-141, Kisspeptin
- [Hair & Skin](https://www.authenticwellness.com/programs/hair-skin.html): GHK-Cu Topical

## How it works

1. Choose a program and check out
2. Complete a Good Faith Exam via Qualiphy
3. Dr. Yang reviews and approves
4. Medication ships to your door
5. Ongoing care check-ins
